metadata.title: 神は愛なり
metadata.subtitle: God Is Love — Japanese gospel song by Mitani Taneyoshi (1900)
metadata.composer: Traditional gospel tune (composer attribution lost to history; the song circulated in late-Meiji evangelical revival meetings)
metadata.lyricist: Mitani Taneyoshi 三谷種吉 (1868–1945), Japan's first dedicated music evangelist
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original Japanese lyrics by Mitani Taneyoshi (d. 1945) — > 70 years post-mortem, fully PD under Japanese copyright law. First published in 基督教福音唱歌 (1900) no. 13 and reprinted in リバイバル唱歌 (1909) no. 47. This is one of the earliest original Japanese hymns (not a translation)
